text:
Return (, rom. Ritān) is a spell card  that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows for a player to instantly transport back to a previously visited city.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the caster to transport to any city or village that they have previously visited. This spell is particularly useful when the user needs to return to a city for any reason. The most common use for this card would be to transport to Masadora to buy more spell cards. It can also be used to escape other players before they can cast short-range spells or physically attack.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1009 :: 
指定した街（行ったことのある街に限る）へ飛ぶ。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1009 :: Return 
Fly to a specified town (limited to a city previously went to).
|}

Trivia

"Return" was first used by Latarza to escape from Killua Zoldyck in Chapter 128.
The player in the illustration of this card is symmetrical to that of "Origin".
